name: Jorudan Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jorudan Co.,Ltd. engages in the development of program products in Japan. It offers Japan Transit Planner, a service that helps to search routes, fares, and schedules of trains and airplanes in Japan. The company is also involved in the planning, designing, development, and maintenance of systems, software, and Fintech solutions; production of digital contents; provision of mobile and Internet contents; travel; advertisement; publishing; sales and maintenance of hardware; development and maintenance of software; and electronic commerce business. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
